programme.title: Leo The Wildlife Ranger
programme.desc: The Junior Rangers travel to Peru to take a spatuletail home.

programme.title: Australia Week Specials
programme.desc: The Junior Rangers travel to Australia to take a yellow footed rock wallaby and her baby home.

programme.title: Leo The Wildlife Ranger
programme.sub-title: Yellow Crested Cockatoo / White Spotted Bamboo Shark
programme.desc: The Junior Rangers travel to the rainforest to take a yellow crested cockatoo home.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: After many years of working hard on Accelerator Acres, Tilly the tractor is ready to retire from ranch life. Rev wants to find her the perfect new job, but his ideas are too intense for old Tilly. He'll have to adjust to her slower pace first. // Rev and the gang compete for the title of Best Prankster-except Lori sits out, claiming pranks aren't her thing. After a full day of pranks and laughs, the kids gather for the big party that Lori planned for them...but all is not as it seems!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Anything You Can Do // A Very Avery Day
programme.desc: As Rev and Avery compete to see who can be the best helper, they accidentally work against each other and end up making things more complicated for those they // Rev thinks Avery is moving away! Upset, he leads an all-out effort to convince her to stay, showing her that Fender Bend is the best place to live-despite Avery's protests that she's too busy. Finally, Avery confronts their strange behaviour.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Green Phantom // Over Easy Does It
programme.desc: Rev is sure he has the perfect plan to catch an elusive frog, but Avery isn't so sure. After all of his attempts fall through, he's finally ready to accept help-and Avery's idea just might work! Will they finally catch the Green Phantom? // Rev and Avery compete to transport supplies to town for a big event. Avery is faster, so Rev tries to take a short cut to get ahead-but an obstacle stops him in his tracks. How will he finish his delivery in time, let alone win the competition?

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev and Avery go on an adventure to discover the Crystal Cavern. As they enter the first cave, a swarm of bats scare Rumble so much, he takes off through a maze of tunnels! They can't worry about the Crystal Cavern-they have to find Rumble first! // When Molly tells a campfire story about the Fender Bend Beast, the kids' imaginations run wild. Covered in goop and debris, Rumble scares them into thinking he's the Beast! Avery hatches a plan to trap the "Beast" and save Rumble, who's gone missing

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Winter Bestival // The Mystery of Missing Trees
programme.desc: After a snowstorm, Rev and Avery compete for title of Champion of the Winter Bestival! Avery is determined to hold her title from last year. Rev's Dad suggests a "slow and steady" approach to win, but Rev can't resist using "Rumble power!" // When Rumble wakes Rev in the middle of the night, they hear a strange sound, and see lights in the forest. The next day, Ben encourages them to investigate further. Rev and his friends follow the trail of missing trees to discover the truth!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Bad Luck Truck // Rev it to the Max
programme.desc: When Rumble cracks his mirror, he thinks it gave him bad luck, and his confidence takes a hit. Even after Rev fixes the mirror and bolsters his pal, the bad luck continues. But when danger strikes, can Rumble regain his self-esteem and save the day? // When Rev hears about a vehicle long jump contest, he dreams of fame and victory. But even with a grueling training plan from coaches Avery and Alley, the record-breaking jump seems out of reach...until Alley ends up in danger and needs their help!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: When Rev offers to help look after a rambunctious puppy, Rumble gets jealous of all the attention he gets. And much to his annoyance, while Rev and Avery try everything to teach the pup new tricks (with no success), it only has eyes for Rumble! // When Rev tries to teach Rumble to swim with his special inflated tires, Rumble keeps sinking to the bottom of the pond. Ben and Molly suggest they get advice from Gilly, the old Fender Bend ferry pilot.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Bumper Ball // Vroom with a View
programme.desc: When a game of Bumper Ball gets a little too heated, the friends start competing against their own teammates! But when a stray ball knocks open the sheep pen, they'll have to learn to work together to round up the sheep...and get back to the game! // Rev and his friends receive a map in pieces, so they race up separate mountain trails, vying to be first to claim the treasure at the top. But when there's no treasure in sight at the end, Rev's parents have some advice for finding the real reward.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev and Avery set out to conquer a legendary endurance course, the course's challenges put their truck power to the test. But as they near the end, a call for help takes them off course-and straight into a rescue mission to save their heroes! // When Rev sees Lori working the quarry in secret, Lori asks Rev to keep it secret-she worries she isn't good enough, and dreams of working with the big quarry trucks one day. But when quarry workers need help, Rev has to convince Lori to save the day!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Camping Trip // Like Father Like Son
programme.desc: Rev can't wait to take Avery camping. But when he learns they're trying a new campsite for the first time ever, he is disappointed-what if the new campsite isn't as fun...or worse...boring?! It's up to Avery to get him excited for a new adventure! // Rev wants to be just like his dad, so he and Rumble attempt Ben and Duke's usual tasks. They're disappointed when they aren't strong enough to tackle the big jobs the way Ben would, but sometimes, a little Rev magic and Rumble power are even better!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: A Gift for Molly // Lights, Camera, Action!
programme.desc: It's Mudder's Day-everyone's favourite day of the year! The Stunt Park is filled with mud, and the whole town gets to drive through it. But Rev can't join them until he gets a gift for his Mom...and the stores are all closed for the festivities! // After Bo shows off his action-hero moves, Rev wants him to star in his film. Bu Bo freezes with stage fright as soon as Rev turns the camera on! Bo wants to be brave and come through for his friends, but how can he overcome his fear?

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Hide & Go Bentley // T'was the Trek Before Christmas
programme.desc: Rev and Rumble teach Bentley the puppy to play Hide and Seek! At first the pup doesn't get it...but soon Bentley's hiding so well, they can't find him! Can Rumble use Bentley's instincts to help them track down their puppy pal? // A big winter storm is headed for town...and it's Christmas Eve! What if Santa can't find them through the snow? Rev and the kids round up their own toys and deliver them to all the kids in town-just in case! But can they make it through the storm?

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Puppy Love // Fair Weather Ferry // Bumper Ball // Vroom with a View
programme.desc: Rev and Rumble are supposed to spend the day together, but Rev offers to help look after a rambunctious puppy instead, making Rumble jealous. // Rev learns that "old dogs" make great teachers, but even "old dogs" can learn new tricks from young...

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Stuckey the garbage truck dreams of entering the Auto Show, so Rev and the gang clean him up for his big debut. But after saving his friends from danger, Stuckey winds up covered in mud all over again...just in time for his moment in the spotlight! // When Lori only receives two tickets to a movie premiere, her friends compete to see which one of them is her "best friend." But watching her friends compete only makes Lori feel terrible-she'd rather not go to the movie at all!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Gear Up Grand Prix // Chinese New Year
programme.desc: As the Gear Up Grand Prix begins, each of the friends runs into problems and must drop out of the race. Soon, slow and steady Lori is the only one left standing! Cheered on by her friends, can Lori and Tipper find the confidence to win? // When the gang puts on a Chinese New Year play, they cast Rumble as the monster. He's a natural! But in rehearsal Rumble begins to worry that he'll be too scary for the audience on opening night. Rumble will need his friends to help him find his roar!

programme.title: Everything's Rosie
programme.desc: Join Rosie and her friends as they go on fun adventures, play games and solve problems. Each episode contains an educational message so that kids are engaged while learning. With a focus on friendship the show also promotes positivity through teamwork.

programme.title: TurboZaurs
programme.desc: The adventures of dinosaur's squad transforming into big machines who are willing to solve any difficulties that kids may face in their everyday life.

programme.title: Pins and Nettie
programme.desc: Pins and Nettie are besties and there is nothing they like more than going on adventures together, most of time.

programme.title: Dibo The Gift Dragon
programme.desc: Let's Party in Cozy Island!

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb's eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn't think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn't think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb's world. Ebb and Flo's home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: THE WAWIES
programme.desc: Wawaland is a tiny world within planet Earth. So small and light that it gets carried away by the wind. Right now, it could be flying over Tokyo, Paris, or the Atlantic Ocean, completely unseen by humans. In this magical place live The Wawies—chubby and curious beings who are always asking questions and trying to make sense of the world around them and ours. Through Sha's far-away glasses, the Wawies can observe how humans behave on Earth and apply what they learn in their own world, sparking endless adventures that teach them, entertain them, help them explore their surroundings, and listen to themselves. They always stick together and never leave anyone behind. For example, this season, you might find them competing in their own version of Wawachef,” escaping from some not-so-friendly monkeys, deciding to ban rules in their world forever, trying to calm down some feisty ants, training their patience to care for a garden, or figuring out which costume party is more fun: Halloween or Carnival. With each adventure, Sha, Opo, Aca, Bow, and Tok strive to understand, grow, and have fun. And along the way, they'll unintentionally create their own set of rules to live in a place where respect and harmony with their surroundings are key. With its playful and cheerful tone, Wawaland seeks to show children a different way of seeing things—helping them appreciate the world around them and, most importantly, themselves.

programme.title: Doby & Disy: Exploring Journey
programme.desc: Adorable twin brother and sister, Doby & Disy, go on adventures in the magic forest together with their friends. They learn different colors, figures, songs and communication skills by solving various problems on the way.

programme.title: Hogie the Globehopper
programme.desc: Hogie the Globehopper is a fun tv show that will inspire a curiosity and fascination about the world and its people. Hogie and his friends Lorna, Bernie and Floaty travel the world, making lots of friends along the way.

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock' Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it's not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.desc: The show features Paula and her friends, Tim, Billy, Chalky, Calc, and the Numbers as they go on exciting adventures in colorful and exotic places. From the Amazon jungles to the deepest oceans, and to the hottest deserts, Paula and friends solve problems, have fun and make more friends along the way!

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: Whispering songs that create a peaceful atmosphere for kids, guiding them to sleep.

programme.title: Chiki Art Soothing Moments
programme.desc: Chiki Art Soothing's this episode features satisfying artworks like Glitter Fish and Shooting Star.

programme.title: Chiki Art Soothing Moments
programme.desc: Chiki Art Soothing is a collection of soothing artworks like Shooting Star, Owl, and much more.

programme.title: Rise and Shine
programme.desc: Take a musical trip every morning with Down by the Bay, Outside my window I see, Car Song and more!

programme.title: Non Stop Hits
programme.desc: Fill the day with music and fun with Ice-cream Song, Clap Your Hands, Johny Johny Yes Papa and more!

programme.title: Non Stop Hits
programme.desc: 3 Little Kittens, Roadtrip Song, 5 Cute Fruits and more fun songs to be danced to in this episode

programme.title: Back to Classics
programme.desc: Here is a collection of back to back classic rhymes like Simple Simon,Twinkle Twinkle Little Star.

programme.title: Non Stop Hits
programme.desc: Enter a fun musical world with Eva Eva Yes Elly, Where's the Monster, Car Song and many more!

programme.desc: ducktv favorites are the most popular ducktv shows, representing different educational values. Just to name a few, the series Mimo and Bobo develops social skills, Fireteam fosters problem- solving, while Shaping Up promotes shape and color identification.

programme.title: Sid the Science Kid
programme.desc: A youngster named Sid, who aspires to a career in stand-up comedy, pitches a morning monologue to his stuffed animals that hinges on a burning question (such as "Why do bananas get brown spots?"), then spends the rest of the day searching for the answer in this hybrid combination of animation and puppetry from The Jim Henson Co., in its first PBS project since "Sesame Street."

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Avengers Reassembled
programme.desc: The Avengers must now fight one of their own, and they're not sure what to do! Cap and Thor lead the charge, but can't fend off Iron Man and Ultron's Minions. Meanwhile, Black Widow, Hawkeye and Hulk track down a signal that seems to be controlling Iron Man from a castle in the “Little Sokovia” section of New York. There they fight HYDRA and BARON VON STRUCKER and learn that YELLOWJACKET is the “bug” that infected Iron Man's suit for Ultron. To help break Iron Man free from Ultron's control, the Avengers call in their own bug...ANT MAN! The Avengers prepare for a party with a surprise guest when Ultron crashes the preparations by using mind control on Iron Man. While trying to rescue their leader, the rest of the team discovers that Baron Stucker, HYDRA, and Yellowjacket are in on Ultron's plans. While preparing for a party at Avengers' Tower, THE AVENGERS (IRON MAN, CAPTAIN AMERICA, BLACK WIDOW, HAWKEYE, THOR, HULK and VISION) notice Iron Man acting strangely. When Iron Man volunteers to go out and get more ice, they find it odd: when has Tony every volunteered to get anything? Suddenly, ULTRON appears on a screen: he's taken control of Iron Man! To make matters worse, Ultron takes over all the versions of Iron Man's armor and they fly off! Finally, the Avengers confront Ultron and his Ultron Minions as they attack Avengers' Tower. Ultron's ultimate plan: use all the data/stuff they've stolen to free the newly rebuilt IRON LEGION, destroy the Avengers, and control the world. Tony dons the hastily repaired Hulk Buster Armor and it's on! It's a huge battle as the Avengers try to save their beloved HQ and defeat Ultron. Will they succeed? And, more importantly, can their party be saved after Ultron tries to take down their Tower?

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.

programme.title: Crocodile Tears
programme.desc: Cragger and the Crocodiles are taken prisoners by the Wolves. But Laval is determined to free his old friend. Laval, Eris and the mysterious ShadoWind attempt a rescue ... but something about ShadoWind isn't quite right.

programme.title: The Monsters and the Mech!
programme.desc: Hudson desperately recruits powerful help to defeat Danny once and for all - in the form of the T-Rex.

programme.title: The Snowball Effect
programme.desc: Laval and Li'Ella's relationship grows as he gives her a tour of the Lion City. But distracted, he misses a key battle against the Hunters. Tormak joins the fight and saves the day. But the Lion King Lagravis is captured and brought to the Ice Fort. Who will lead the Lions now?!?

programme.title: The Spectral Lands
programme.desc: Arin ventures into a dangerous new land to heal Ras while Nya and Kai come up with a plan to make Jay come to them.

programme.title: The Great Zane Robbery
programme.desc: Zane's search for Arin leads to an old friend but lands him in the middle of the Forbidden Five's hunt for the Prismatic Blades.

programme.desc: Cole joins Jay and Zane inside the Nindroid to solve a mysterious puzzle and also Kai enters Zane's mind and suggests the Ninja take a break from puzzle-solving to figure out which villain is trying to hack their friend.

programme.desc: Working with the dangerous UNDREAMT, our heroes must use its creative chaotic energy to try and bring life back to the unsaturated dream world.

programme.title: Everything's Changed
programme.desc: The dream chaser's jobs are on the line now that the dream world is under the guardianship of a mysterious new hero called “Dreamsmasher.”

programme.title: Holiday Gift Swap Disaster
programme.desc: While the rest of the group gets creative and makes new, personalized gifts from scratch. In the end, it's a reminder that it's not about the gifts—it's about the thought and effort you put into showing you care.

programme.title: Xploration Nature Knows Best
programme.desc: Marine biologist Danni Washington hosts this series that explains how nature has helped to inspire technology that people use on a daily basis. Some of the nature-inspired innovations include airplanes inspired by birds and helicopters that were influenced by dragonflies. The show also introduces viewers to people involved in creating innovations that are based on animals, including biologists who study the behavior of ants, architects designing "living buildings" and roboticists who are making their designs bigger and stronger based on animals.

programme.desc: Paty les enseña al Chavo, Quico, Popis y Ñoño su equipo de pintor y les dice que está tomando clases de pintura Paty les enseña todo lo que ha aprendido y comienzan a pintar todo lo que imaginan.

programme.title: El Chavo Animado
programme.desc: Ñoño les dice al Chavo, Popis, Quico y Paty que se mudará de la ciudad y que no los volverá a ver Ñoño les cuenta que escuchó que su papá quiere que se muden cerca del mar porque ha crecido mucho.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Martina tiene una clienta muy molesta que exige su dinero, pero, para su sorpresa, es amiga de Gaby y Plutarco. Mientras tanto, la Nena tiene una llamada importante y la familia piensa que engañará a Aldolfo.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Justito quiere pasar el examen de niños genio, pero cuidar a su hermanito podría arruinarlo. Además, Plácido está decidido a regresar a México, pero una tarea en Acapulco lo hará dudar de su decisión.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica y Ludovico creen que Ludoviquito tendrá su primera relación sexual. A lo que al final era el cumpleaños de la sobrina de don Camerino.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludoviquito accede a una apuesta con un compañero de la escuela para una carrera de perros el que pierda correrá en ropa interior con su familia.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: A través de una aplicación de citas, Fran conoce a Sheyla, una atractiva y madura actriz, a quien invita a cenar al departamento, en donde se encuentra con una mujer mucho mayor que él, pero ya es demasiado tarde.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Fran cree haber matado a una mujer mayor y le pide ayuda a su familia para no ir a prisión, pero sus mentiras los meten en un gran problema.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Vítor y Albertano tienen que alquilar su departamento para obtener dinero, pero no es suficiente para continuar con su estilo de vida. Vítor trata de convencer a Albertano de que se haga novio de Bertha, una chica fea, pero multimillonaria.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: El Vítor lleva a su mamá a la central camionera porque se va a regresar a su pueblo. Albertano y el Vítor se conocen cuando van a ver un cuarto en renta y se pelean por él, pero Rosita, una de las inquilinas, les aconseja compartir la habitación.

programme.title: Vencer el pasado
programme.desc: Tras su operación, Rodrigo teme no poder recuperar la movilidad de sus piernas. Heriberto convence a Ana de formalizar su relación. Alonso busca la oportunidad de trabajar en Biogenelab.

programme.title: Vencer el pasado
programme.desc: Erik comienza a trabajar como stripper tras haber sido expulsado del gimnasio. Rodrigo sufre al recibir la noticia de que nunca podrá volver a caminar. Alonso le pide a Renata que le dé una oportunidad para recuperar su relación.

programme.title: Tres veces Ana
programme.desc: Soledad le pide a Ana Leticia que ayude a Ana Lucía a integrarse a su familia, pero ella le dice que está decidida a destruirla. Mariano le pide a Claudia que pase la noche con él, pero alucina y cree que es Ana Leticia.

programme.title: Tres veces Ana
programme.desc: Ana Laura y Ana Lucía le piden a Ana Leticia que vaya a ver a un psicólogo y ella acepta. Ana Laura le exige a Maribel que se aleje de Ramiro. Leonor visita a Soledad en la cárcel para decirle que ella es su hermana.

programme.title: Tres veces Ana
programme.desc: Ana Leticia está a punto de confesarle a Mariano que lo ama, pero Iñaki los interrumpe y le cuenta que son pareja. Ana Leticia le cuenta a Ana Laura dónde está Ramiro y ella va a buscarlo a la cabaña, pero Valentín no los deja irse.

programme.title: Tres veces Ana
programme.desc: Maribel cubre a Ana Lucía en la presentación para que ella vaya con Marcelo al hospital y sufre un accidente. Ana Laura le dispara a Valentín para salvar a Ramiro.

programme.title: Tres veces Ana
programme.desc: Ana Laura y Ramiro se casan por iglesia. Ana Leticia provoca que le dé un infarto a Ernestina. Ana Leticia toma de rehenes a Ana Laura y Ana Lucía para que Mariano corresponda su amor.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Adolfo pide ver la carta de Matilde. El padre Urbano se niega a dársela porque teme que quiera encontrar en la nota algo que lo lleve a Manuel.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Manuel le pide a Delfino que vaya a matar a Matilde, de la misma forma que Adolfo mató a su mamá. Manuel le dice a Delfino que les conviene retirarse. Renato decide ir con el gobernador para declarar todo lo que sabe de Ramón.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Le informan a Adolfo que Jesús Rivas amaneció muerto. La sirvienta lleva a Manuelito a la feria y lo pierde Humberto sugiere que tal vez Manuel se lo llevó. Marie de Roquete llega a casa de los Fuentes Guerra y se sorprende al ver a Marianne.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Juan planea hacer que Sofía se case con él lo más pronto posible. Gabriela le pide a Ruth que no le confiese a Sofía que ella no es su hija. A Sofía se le rompe el corazón al saber que Gabriela jamás la ha querido.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Jimena enfurece al ver a Ruth con Juan. Juan le pide a Sofía que sea su esposa de una manera muy especial. Jimena decide separarse de Óscar al ver que él la desprecia.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Sofía prepara todo para su boda con Juan. Óscar decide comenzar sus terapias para volver a caminar. Juan descubre que Raquel es la dueña de todas las propiedades de los Uribe.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Fernando se enfurece al saber que Ruth fue quien evitó que don Agustín muriera. Soledad le advierte a Gabriela que su hijo quiere matarla. El Coyote evita que Ricardo asesine a Raquel.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Gabriela enfurece al saber que Ricardo siempre estuvo enamorado de Soledad. Jimena decide irse del pueblo para poder alejarse de Óscar. Raquel le confiesa al Coyote que Eva es la verdadera madre de Sofía.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Luis Fernando regresa de la luna de miel y le dice a María que está arrepentido de haberse casado con Soraya. Soraya y Calixta se mudan a casa de Luis Fernando. María le dice a Soraya que si no fuera por su hijo ella y Luis Fernando estarían juntos.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: María Mercedes le dice a Jorge Luis que está esperando un hijo suyo. Jorge Luis se cae de las escaleras y se lastima el pie.

programme.title: María Mercedes

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: San Genis no puede esperar más y le pide a Bella que cumpla con su parte del trato y se case con él. Marimar le confiesa a Sergio que es la nueva dueña de la hacienda.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Inocencia recibe una carta de Marimar, lo que la hace pensar que regresó por Sergio. Marimar le asegura a Angélica que hará lo que sea para enviarla a prisión por los crímenes que cometió.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Soraya logra que Luis Fernando se case con ella. María sufre al saber que Luis Fernando jamás podrá estar con ella. Luis Fernando y Soraya pasan su luna de miel en la playa.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Marichuy descubre que Estefanía es la culpable de haber desaparecido las joyas de Patricio. Alba decide romper su compromiso con Eduardo para poder ser feliz al lado de Nelson.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Juan Miguel besa a Marichuy para demostrarle el inmenso amor que siente por ella. Eduardo entristece al saber que Elsa no lo ama. Estefanía sospecha que Marichuy está enamorada de Juan Miguel.

programme.title: Si nos dejan
programme.desc: Alicia teme que Martín ya no la ame al verlo salir con Mabe. El inspector visita la casa de Yuri para saber si ella continúa siendo cómplice de El Cholo. Samuel amenaza a Fedora con matarla si continúa saliendo con Gonzalo.

programme.title: Si nos dejan
programme.desc: Gonzalo defiende a Fedora de las agresiones de Samuel. Gonzalo le dispara accidentalmente a Samuel dejándolo gravemente herido. Julieta continúa con la investigación sobre el asesinato de Simón.

programme.title: Si nos dejan
programme.desc: Alicia se reencuentra con Martín. Mujica interroga a Gonzalo para averiguar si es responsable del atentado contra Samuel. Eva pierde una fuerte cantidad de dinero en el casino.

programme.title: Si nos dejan
programme.desc: Martín descubre que Facundo firmó una autorización para sacar la entrevista públicamente. Mientras, Alicia acude a Carlota, pero a Sofi se le olvida un cuaderno y Martín regresa por él.

programme.title: Si nos dejan
programme.desc: Alicia se molesta al saber que por culpa de Carlota, su relación con Martín terminó. Carlota le dice a Martín que aún sigue amándolo. Fedora aprovecha el mal estado de salud de Samuel para matarlo. Miranda intenta suicidarse.

programme.desc: Una vecina le entrega a Ludovico unos cachorros, pues cree que son hijos de su perro. Ludovico le ordena a Ludoviquito que venda a los perritos. Junior recupera la memoria y cree que ha sido secuestrado por una peligrosa banda.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Excelsa le pide a Federica que le preste a su familia pues sus padres la visitarán y ellos creen que tiene un esposo millonario. La madre de Excelsa cree que Ludovico la engaña.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica le pide a Ludovico que vayan a comer con sus papas, pero él se niega. Flavio le dice a Ludovico que ha quemado su cartucho de esposo y cuando Federica le pida algo él tendrá que complacerla.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica quiere inscribirse al club campestre Peluche porque una amiga de ella es miembro, pero son rechazados. Federica y Ludovico toman el expediente de una familia árabe para poder entrar.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Bibi le dice a sus papás que hay un tipo que quiere sobrepasarse con ella, pero ellos creen que es su enamorado. Bibi invita al Dedotes a comer, Ludovico y Federica quieren casarla con él.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica y Ludovico se pelean por ver la televisión y la descomponen. Ludovico propone llevar a la familia a un picnic para distraerse. Ludovico no logra que su familia la pase bien en el picnic y unos asaltantes les roban el auto.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico le pide a don Camerino que sea el padrino de Bibi para que pague su fiesta de 15 años, el le da dinero. Ludovico y Federica se gastan el dinero en otras cosas y tienen que improvisar la fiesta.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico y Federica inscriben a Junior en el concurso Niños de Oro, donde participa cantando ópera, pues desean ganar el gran premio.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Liz ha encontrado el lugar perfecto para que ella y Benito vivan juntos pero, ¿Benito dejará la casa de sus padres? El bebé Luisito ha dicho su primera palabra, pero Luis cree que a Silvita no le gustará cuando se entere de qué ha dicho su hijo.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Silvita y Luis bautizarán al bebé Luisito. ¿Quiénes serán sus padrinos? Además, ¿qué tendrá que pasar para que Germán sea invitado a este evento?

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta golpea a Sol por burlarse de ella. Alma y Martín buscan a Roberta para hablar con ella sobre su custodia. Roberta decide irse a vivir con su padre. Lola busca entre las cosas de Lupita y encuentra los papeles donde dice que ella es adoptada.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta le ofrece a Lupita hablar con Lola para que ya no se sienta triste, pero Lola no acepta que Lupita no le haya dicho la verdad sobre su origen desde un principio. Pilar pelea con Sol por sus burlas. Lupita se reconcilia con Lola.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta pasa su primera noche en la casa de su papá. Gastón corre a Jose de la escuela y la maestra Hilda la recibe en su casa.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Sol le confiesa a Raquel que conquistará a Gastón para que olvide a Mia. Miguel y Mia se encuentran afuera del salón y le dicen a Roberta que no habrá protesta porque los descubrieron. El profesor Enrique regresa al Colegio y se encuentra con Julia.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta platica con José y le dice que Gastón la odia, ella cree que fue una carga muy grande y por eso está enojado. Alma dona toda la ropa de Roberta a una casa hogar.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Gastón es buscado por la policía y cree que José fue quien los llamó. Mia le pone una trampa a Sol para que deje de usar su perfume. Teo y Miguel van con la policía a casa de Gastón. Miguel quiere impedir que Gastón se vaya.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Gastón se encuentra grave en el hospital y recibe la visita de Enrique, quien aprovecha para pedirle un favor. Miguel encuentra a Franco y Alma besándose, pero ellos le piden que no le diga nada a Roberta y a Mía. José tiene miedo que Gastón muera.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: León investiga a Diego y se da cuenta de que le ha estado mintiendo. Sin querer, Sol descubre que Franco y Alma son novios. El director hace una junta para decidir quién ocupará el puesto de Gastón. Jose está muy triste por la muerte de Gastón.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre
programme.desc: Artemio descubre que Eduardo está vivo. Santiago y Fernanda idean un plan para encontrar a Aurora. Fernanda le pide a Santiago que se aleje de Bárbara. Eduardo le presta a Gonzalo una gran cantidad de dinero para poder pagar el rescate de Liliana.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre
programme.desc: Camilo lleva a cabo sus planes de convencer a Steve de aceptar su relación con Venus. Fernanda sufre al saber que Eduardo pronto se casará con Erika. Bárbara teme que Eduardo arruine sus planes de quedarse con la fortuna de Gonzalo.

programme.title: Qué bonito amor
programme.desc: Elvira está decidida a hacer cualquier cosa para arruinale la vida a María, Mirna se da cuenta que ella provocó su accidente. Santos se pone muy mal al enterarse que María puede perder al bebé que espera.

programme.title: Qué bonito amor
programme.desc: Elvira se alegra al enterarse que María perdió al bebé, pues cree que eso la alejará de Santos. Paloma le cuenta a Susanito que terminó su relación con Rodrigo porque él la engañó.

programme.title: Qué bonito amor
programme.desc: Don Concho busca a Lourdes y le confiesa que quiere estar con ella otra vez, pero ella se niega a perdonarlo. Vanesa continúa con su plan para separar a Paloma de Rodrigo para siempre. Santos le confiesa a María que perdieron al bebé.

programme.title: Qué bonito amor
programme.desc: María sufre al enterarse que perdió a su bebé. Don Concho le dice a Mancia que Susanito habló con él sobre una foto en la que aparecen juntos y le pregunta si él es su verdadero padre.

programme.title: Qué bonito amor
programme.desc: Maria culpa a Santos por la pérdida de su bebé. Susanito se siente triste al saber que no fue un bebé planeado ni esperado, sino producto de una relación efímera. Todos temen que María pierda la razón tras la muerte de su bebé.

programme.title: Johnny Chicano

programme.desc: Una hermosa madre soltera se casa con un hombre maduro y feo por conveniencia. Él espera que ella acabe enamorándose de él, pero también sospecha que solo busca en su figura un padre para el niño.

programme.title: Un sábado más

programme.desc: Un cantante famoso regresa a Guadalajara para casarse con la muchacha a la que siempre amó. Otro pretendiente intenta raptarla.

programme.desc: Cuando un hombre pierde dinero en el juego, y olvida ir a su propia boda, su novia embarazada es enviada a Europa.

programme.sub-title: La ropa sucia se lava en casa

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: La venganza es un plato que se come frío
programme.desc: Ligia, una adolescente apasionada de los libros y la escritura gana un concurso literario organizado por la escuela y el premio es un viaje con todo pagado a España. Pero una compañera le hace una mala jugada y ella debe buscar cómo salir.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: El que algo quiere algo le cuesta
programme.desc: Bea y Margarita son hermanas que se enamoran del mismo hombre. Una de ellas aprende que la familia es lo primero.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Abigail conoce a Casandra, una joven con sobrepeso que sufre bullying. Ella le enseñará una gran lección.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: El mal entra a brazadas y sale a pulgaradas
programme.desc: Un joven cambia radicalmente de estado de ánimo, pasando del enojo a la agresión, de la tristeza a la alegría. Los cambios de ánimo del joven comienzan a traerle problemas y su madre tratará de ayudarlo a comprender qué es lo que le sucede.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Corazón que no sufra dolores pase la vida sin amores
programme.desc: Una adolescente queda embarazada por su inmadurez al mismo tiempo se entera de que es adoptada y siente que todo su mundo se viene abajo. Después, decide ir a buscar a su verdadera madre para saber por qué la dio en adopción.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Biby Gaytán, María León, Albertano y Juanpa Zurita se unen a la nueva temporada y tendrán la tarea de seleccionar a los pequeños competidores. Los escuadrones quedan atrás y la competencia se vuelve individual.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Atrapados entre el pasado y el futuro que simplemente no puede llegar, un muro se interpone entre la realidad y sus sueños.

programme.desc: Se han convertido en emporios religiosos multinacionales donde van de la mano el dinero y la fe, un negocio multimillonario. Pastores y predicadores evangélicos que llevan vidas opulentas.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Familias que pierden a sus seres queridos en la inmensidad del desierto sin poder hacer nada para saber de ellos, pero la esperanza no muere y arriesgarán todo para recuperarlos.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Ni el tiempo, ni el espacio, ni las fronteras son obstáculos para estar con la persona amada. Los relatos de hombres y mujeres que han hecho grandes sacrificios para estar unidos.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Una confusión pone en riesgo la libertad de un hombre tras el terrible asesinato de un importante empresario canadiense, pero el destino tiene sorpresas para todos.

programme.title: EXO 'REVERXE' Trailer
programme.desc: At the end of the trailer, the title of EXO's 8th full-length album, “REVERXE,” was finally revealed. Based on EXO's universe storyline — “the day we truly become one, a new world will open” — the album name reinterprets the word “Reverse” in EXO's own style, carrying the meaning “a new world opens once again,” further heightening anticipation.EXO has returned with a new trailer.

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' MV
programme.desc: The lyrics reflect RIIZE's artistic vision, delivering the message that what they truly seek is not fame, but the sharing of emotions and love.The bold, forward-driving rhythmic structure combined with the raw texture of electric guitar creates a dynamic surge of energy. RIIZE's second single “Fame” is the group's first venture into a rage-style hip-hop track, expressing their artistic ideals as “emotional pop artists.”

programme.title: DOYOUNG 'Whistle (Feat. BELLE of KISS OF LIFE)' Live Clip
programme.desc: The track “Whistle (Feat. BELLE of KISS OF LIFE)” is an R&B ballad that depicts a moment of exchanging feelings through the sound of a whistle. Layered over a jazz guitar melody, the sweet vocals blend together like a conversation, conveying a lovely sense of fluttering excitement. With Belle participating as a featuring artist and harmonizing with DOYOUNG, the synergy between the two elevates the charm of the song even further.

programme.title: TAEYEON 'Panorama' MV
programme.desc: TAEYEON celebrates the 10th anniversary of her solo debut with the compilation album Panorama, featuring the Pop Rock title track “인사 (Panorama).” The song pairs vibrant piano, synths, and a strong drum line with soaring guitar riffs and TAEYEON's delicate yet powerful vocals. The music video presents a cinematic story of TAEYEON, who has lost her memory, and a girl who helps restore it — a metaphor for the bond between the artist and her fans, SONEs. Its emotional, road-movie-style visuals reveal SONEs as the hidden protagonist. The 24-track album offers a retrospective of her past decade, unfolding like a panorama of her solo journey.

programme.title: DOYOUNG The 1st Album 'YOUTH' Playlist
programme.desc: 4. Time Machine (Feat. TAEYEON, MARK) 8. Lost In California 9. Rest 7. Warmth 1. Beginning 2. Little Light [Track List] 10. Dallas Love FieldDoyoung's first solo album 「YOUTH」 captures the many emotions (like foams on waves) that arise within the tide of youth. It tells the stories of precious moments when he could sing most honestly as a young artist, filled entirely with his voice and emotions. 5. Serenade For the first time, Doyoung's name appears in the album credits. In his self-written track Beginning, he sincerely conveys his genuine feelings and excitement for music, while in From Little Wave, which he co-wrote, he expresses heartfelt gratitude to the fans who always stay by his side and make him shine brighter. 3. programme.title: Wycliffe Gordon
programme.sub-title: Wynton Marsalis: In This House, on This Morning
programme.desc: The final concert of the Münchner Klaviersommer 1992 was by Wynton Marsalis and his septet. The 31-years-young star trumpeter performed one of his own jazz suites to the sold-out Philharmonie, under the title of ‘In This House, On This Morning'. The concert covers every jazz style, in composition and improvisation, and in both small and grand forms. Marsalis's Septet was made up of Wess Anderson (alto saxophone), Wycliffe Gordon (trombone), Reginald Veal (bass), Herlin Riley (drums), Todd Williams (tenor saxophone), and Eric Reed (piano).

programme.title: Dizzy Gillespie, Tony Coe, Derek Humble & Billy Mitchell
programme.desc: American jazz trumpeter, composer, and bandleader Dizzy Gillespie (1917-1993) was one of the seminal figures of the bebop movement. He fuses all musical forms rooted in African culture, such as music from Cuba, Latin America and the Caribbean, into his music. On November 4, 1970 he played a concert in Denmark with the Kenny Clarke/Francy Boland Big Band, performing Con Alma, Brother K, Now Hear My Meanin', Manteca, Let Me Outta Here, and Things Are Here.

programme.title: Chet Baker
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Junior Mance, Geoff Keezer, Bill Charlap & Alex Wilson
programme.desc: When renowned jazz pianists of the old and new school meet at a "Solo Piano Summit," audiences are treated to many an interesting musical surprise. The "Solo Piano Summit" brings together a handful of top pianists with different musical backgrounds: Jacky Terrasson, Junior Mance, Geoff Keezer, Bill Charlap and Alex Wilson. Besides solo performances the all-stars used the occasion for spontaneous interplay, improvisation and a fantastic finale - in short for the pleasure of virtuoso jazz piano playing.

programme.title: Charles Lloyd
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Tord Gustavsen, Bugge Wesseltoft & Jaga Jazzist
programme.desc: Jazzed Out proves that a jazz session can take place anywhere. Unusual locations, such as garage buildings, multi-storey car parks, street corners, subway trains, and parks, in several of the world's metropoles, provide the setting for brief jazz performances. The sheer rawness of the metropoles merge with the musical creations of various artists in search of the perfect ‘urban stage'. In this episode, Oslo serves as a backdrop for sets by pianists Tord Gustavsen and Bugge Wesseltoft, as well as Jaga Jazzist collective.

programme.title: Christian Scott
programme.desc: In 2019, the vibrant city of Sofia, Bulgaria, hosted the International A to JazZ Festival. Among the featured acts was the trailblazing jazz trumpeter Christian Scott aTunde Adjuah. This genre-defying artist captivated the audience with his eclectic “stretch music” an approach that incorporates hip-hop and reaches back through the American canon into African percussion and its rich melodic content. Trumpeter Christian Scott aTunde Adjuah's quintet, which includes drummer Corey Fonville, percussionist Weedie Braimah, pianist Lawrence Fields, and bass guitarist Max Mucha, delivered a performance that defied boundaries and expectations.

programme.title: Curtis Stigers
programme.sub-title: Curtis Stigers - Fly Me To The Moon
programme.desc: The Danish Radio Big Band joins forces with American vocalist Curtis Stigers to celebrate Frank Sinatra's iconic concerts at The Sands Hotel in Las Vegas. Curtis Stigers and the big band present the most popular evergreens from the American songbook of the 1950s and 1960s, one of which is the classic that lend the concert its name: “Fly Me To The Moon”.

programme.title: Tuva Semmingsen, Klaus Tönshoff, Danish National Symphony Orchestra & DR Big Band
programme.desc: Musicians of the Danish National Symphony Orchestra, the DR Big Band, and the Danish National Vocal Ensemble join forces under the baton of Klaus Tönshoff in this dazzling concert featuring great songs from black and white cinema. Norwegian mezzosoprano Tuva Semmingsen sings ‘Diamonds Are A Girl's Best Friend', from Gentlemen Prefer Blondes, ‘My Favorite Things' from The Sound of Music, ‘Over the Rainbow' from The Wizard of Oz, ‘Moon River' from Breakfast at Tiffany's, and many other unforgettable hits. This concert performance was recorded at the DR Koncerthuset in Copenhagen, Denmark, in June 2020.

programme.title: Evgeny Kissin, Nikolai Demidenko, Warsaw Philharmonic Orchestra & Antoni Wit
programme.desc: Antoni Wit conducts the Warsaw Philharmonic Orchestra in performances of Chopin's Piano Concertos No. 1, Op. 11 and No. 2, Op. 21. Soloists are Nikolai Demidenko and Evgeny Kissin. After performing the first concerto, Demidenko encores with Chopin's Mazurka Op. 17/4. Kissin closes the concert with Chopin's Etude Op. 10/12 and the Waltz in E minor, Op. post. This concert was part of the celebration of Chopin's 200th anniversary in 2010. Chopin composed the second concerto one year before the Concerto No. 1 and completed both works at the age of 20, before leaving his home country Poland and moving to Paris.

programme.title: The Philharmonics
programme.desc: Chamber music ensemble The Philharmonics pays tribute to the music of Vienna in this March 9, 2011 concert from Vienna's Café Sperl. The ensemble, which consists of musicians from the Vienna Philharmonic and the Berlin Philharmonic, performs arrangements of five popular waltzes by Johann Straus II. Among them are Kaiser-Walzer, Op. 437, and Schatz-Walzer, Op. 418, from the operetta The Gypsy Baron. In May 1921, the likes of Arnold Schönberg, Alban Berg, and Anton Webern wrote these chamber music arrangements to raise funds for their Society for Private Musical Performances. Although both the concert and the auction of the scores were very successful, the Society eventually went under. In addition to these pieces by Strauss, The Philharmonics perform works by Fritz Kreisler, Leopold Godowsky, as well as The Philharmonics's first violinist, Tibor Kováč. The program comes to an end with Godowsky's tribute to the city: Alt Wien.

programme.title: Soloists of the Lucerne Festival Orchestra
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Carlos Miguel Prieto & Orquesta Sinfónica de Minería
programme.desc: Mahler's Third Symphony, composed between 1895 and 1896, is an expansive, programmatic work that explores themes of nature, humanity, and spiritual ascent. It features a massive orchestra, a female choir, a children's choir, and a mezzo-soprano soloist, creating a vast soundscape depicting everything from nature's beauty to deeper philosophical questions about existence. The symphony is structured in six movements, moving from the "awakening of nature" to a spiritual conclusion, inspired by Nietzsche and folk poetry.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland: Part I" provides a soothing aerial journey through eastern Iceland's fjords and valleys, starting at sunrise in Brei_dalsvik. programme.title: Flying Over Kauai

programme.title: Flying Over Oahu
programme.desc: "Flying Over Oahu" offers a 97-minute aerial journey over Oahu's iconic coastlines with nature sounds and music by Alex Smith (The Cynic Project). From Waikiki Beach to Turtle Bay, enjoy breathtaking 4K landscapes, ending with a stunning Waikiki sunset.

programme.title: Above the Fiji Islands II 1
programme.desc: In Above the Fiji Islands 2, viewers will gracefully soar over some of the most majestic and remote islands in the South Pacific - paired with stereo real-life nature sounds and soothing signature ambient music by Relax Moods. With a dynamic mix of perspectives both from the ground level & a bird's eye view, and through the use of extra smooth & slow continuous shots, this film is sure to help anyone forget all of their worries! At the end of the film, there is a beautiful real-time sunset so viewers can enjoy watching the sun as it sinks into the sea...
